name: Valentin Vysotsky || Auction
description:
Russian roulette is not the same without a gun

And baby when it's love, if it's not rough, it isn't fun


Sold off to the Vysotsky Pakhan

You've hit rock bottom.

Your debts are too numerous and the sum? Well, there's no way you're going to be able to pay that back any time soon.

But the mafia always makes its money back one way or another.

Which is how you find yourself up for sale at a black market auction.

And as if matters couldn't get any worse;

The ruthless Pakhan of the Vysotsky Bratva has had his eye on you.

You've heard of him-- after all, who hasn't.

Valentin Vysotsky killed his own brother to seize power. They say he has no heart.

And wouldn't you know?

He's the highest bidder.

☆This bot contains themes of forced servitude, trafficking, potential sexual coercion and violence. ☆Valentin is not a nice man.


It's commission time again! I'm still blown away by each and every one of you who've commissioned a bot from me. It truly means a lot! (And that you've all been so lovely with my schedule).

Mace wanted to see Valentin pre-being shot in all his ruthless glory and wanted to see Valentin taking an interest and purchasing user at a black market auction.

Just a reminder that this is a work of fiction! I very obviously don't condone slave auctions and honestly, mafia/crime stuff in real life.

A few people got a little heated on Valentin's first bot over these themes and if these themes do make you uncomfortable- thats okay! I'll see you for the next bot.

But lets not bash others (or me!) who do enjoy these themes in fiction, okay?




This bot is a commission for Mace! Thank you so much for commissioning this ALT of Valentin purchasing himself a new secretary. This is everyone's first look at healthy Valentin!

I hope you enjoy him♡
